title: Print Data Analysis and BI Review：Print MIS Report Dashboard、Power BI and Tableau Analysis Comparison｜2026 Review
description: Comprehensive Review2026 Print Data Analysis Print MIS Report Dashboard、Power BI、Tableau Analysis，Comparison Business Analysis、Production Analysis、Customer Analysis Function，for Print Enterprise Data Decision Provides Solutions。 Updated Function and Price Comparison，Find the Best for You Solution！Professional Review Help You Decision！
content:
Print Data Analysis Value and Decision Support

Print Data Analysis is Print Enterprise Data Decision Basic，Communication ProcessBusiness Analysis、Production Analysis、Customer AnalysisInsights Enterprise Business Status 、Development Trends Opportunities、Decision Optimization。Legacy System Print Enterprise Data Fragmented System，Analysis Depend Manual Report Dashboard。Data Analysis Tool Complete Data、Visualization Report Dashboard、Automation Analysis，Improve Decision Efficiency。

Print Analysis Requirements：

  • Business Analysis：Operation Receive、Profit、Cost Analysis
  • Production Analysis：Production Ability、Efficiency、Equipment Analysis
  • Customer Analysis：Customer Value、Customer Churn、Customer Structure Analysis
  • Storage Analysis：Storage Turnover、Storage Cost Analysis

2026 Print Data Analysis CurrentPrint MIS Report Dashboard Basic、Power BI Price Comparison、Tableau Professional3 Solution。

Print MIS Report Dashboard Review

MIS Setting Report Dashboard Function

Print MIS System Inner SettingReport Dashboard Function，Provide Basic Business、Production Report Dashboard。

Core Function

  • Business Report Dashboard：Operation Receive Report Dashboard、Profit Report Dashboard、Cost Report Dashboard
  • Production Report Dashboard：Production Ability Report Dashboard、Efficiency Report Dashboard、Equipment Utilization Report Dashboard
  • Customer Report Dashboard：Customer Order Reports Dashboard、Customer Value Report Dashboard
  • Storage Report Dashboard：Storage Report Dashboard、Storage Turnover Report Dashboard
  • Custom Report Dashboard：Custom Report Dashboard Generate

EFI Pace Report Dashboard

  • Dashboard：Business Dashboard Real-time Display
  • Standard Report Dashboard：Pre-designed Standard Report Dashboard Database
  • Custom Report Dashboard：Custom Report Dashboard Generate Tool
  • Report Dashboard Output：Report Dashboard Output Excel、PDF

User Review Price

Print Business Recognizes MIS Report Dashboard Cover Basic Analysis Requirements，Real-time Dashboard Easy-to-Use。but Complex Analysis Need Professional BI Tool。

Price

Report Dashboard Function is MIS Setting：

  • Included in MIS License：EFI Pace、Tharstern Report Dashboard Included in Main System License

Power BI Print Analysis Review

Cost-Effective Comparison BI Tool

Power BI is Microsoft BI Tool，FocusCost-Effective Comparison、Easy to Use、Microsoft Platform Integration。

Core Function

  • Data Connection：Connection Multiple Data Source（MIS、Excel、SQL）
  • Data Build Model：Data Build Model、Data Close System Build Establish
  • Visualization：Rich Visualization Chart Table
  • Report Dashboard Distribution：Report Dashboard Distribution Sharing
  • Mobile View：Mobile Report Dashboard View

Print Data Connection

  • MIS Data Connection：Connection EFI Pace、Tharstern Database
  • Excel Data：Excel Data Import
  • SQ Lbase：SQ Lbase Connection

Print Analysis Dashboard

Power BI Print Analysis Dashboard：

  • Business Dashboard：Operation Receive、Profit、Cost Real-time Dashboard
  • Production Dashboard：Production Ability、Equipment Utilization Dashboard
  • Customer Dashboard：Customer Value、Customer Structure Dashboard

Microsoft Platform Integration

  • Excel Integration：Excel Data Import
  • Teams Integration：Report Dashboard Sharing via Teams
  • SharePoint Integration：Report Dashboard Distribution SharePoint

User Review Price

Print Business Recognizes Power BI Price Comparison High，Easy to Use，Microsoft Platform Integration Easy-to-Use。Suitable for Existing Microsoft Platform Print Business。

Price

  • Power BI Free Version：Individual Free License
  • Power BI Pro：$10/User/Month（Report Dashboard Sharing）
  • Power BI Premium：$20/User/Month（Enterprise Level）

Tableau Analysis Review

Professional BI Visualization Tool

Tableauis Professional BI Visualization Tool，FocusProfessional Visualization、Comprehensive Analysis。

Core Function

  • Data Connection：Connection Multiple Data Source
  • Visualization：Rich Professional Visualization
  • Analysis：Comprehensive Data Analysis Function
  • Report Dashboard Distribution：Report Dashboard Distribution Tableau Server
  • Mobile View：Mobile Report Dashboard View

Print Analysis Features

  • Complex Visualization：Complex Print Data Visualization
  • Comprehensive Analysis：Comprehensive Print Data Analysis
  • Interactive Analysis：Interactive Mode Data Analysis
  • Predictive Analysis：Predictive Analysis Function

Tableau Template

Tableau Analysis Template：

  • Business Analysis Template：Print Business Analysis Template
  • Production Analysis Template：Print Production Analysis Template
  • Customer Analysis Template：Print Customer Analysis Template

User Review Price

Large Print Business Recognizes Tableau Visualization Professional，Comprehensive Analysis Strong。but Tableau Cost is High，Small Print Business Barrier。

Price

  • Tableau Creator：$70/User/Month（Design+Analysis）
  • Tableau Explorer：$42/User/Month（Analysis）
  • Tableau Viewer：$15/User/Month（View）

2026 Print Data Analysis Trend Estimate

1. AI Data Analysis

AI Data Analysis：AI Automatic Current Data Insights、AI Predictive Analysis、AI Anomaly Common Warning。Power BI Already Introduction Input AI。

2. Real-time Data Analysis

Real-time Data Analysis：Real-time Data Dashboard、Real-time Business Monitoring、Real-time Warning。MIS Dashboard Real-time Display。

3. Self-service Analysis

Self-service Analysis Common in：Business Staff Self-service Analysis、Self-service Generate Report Dashboard、Self-service Data Search。Power BI Self-service Analysis Easy to Use。

4. Print Analysis Template

Print Analysis Template Complete Mature：Print Execution Industry Analysis Template Library、Best Implementation Analysis Template。Tableau Template。

5. Data Analysis Mobileization

Data Analysis Mobileization：Mobile Report Dashboard View、Mobile Dashboard、Mobile Warning Messages。

Selection Type Recommendation

  • MIS User Basic Analysis：MIS Report Dashboard Cover Basic Requirements，Real-time Dashboard Easy-to-Use
  • Microsoft Platform Print Business：Power BI Price Comparison High，Microsoft Platform Integration Easy-to-Use
  • Large Print Integration Team Comprehensive Analysis：Tableau Visualization Professional，Comprehensive Analysis Strong
  • Self-service Analysis Requirements：Power BI Self-service Analysis Easy to Use
  • Budget Limited：Power BI Free Version Individual Use

Print Data Analysis Selection Type Need Consider Analysis Comprehensive、Platform Integration、Budget。Start with MIS Report Dashboard Start，Gradually Upgrade to BIor Tableau。
